hooks.command: if command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1; then if ! pre-commit run --all-files; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "pre-commit checks failed"}'; exit 1; fi; fi
git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null || true; if git rebase origin/main --quiet 2>/dev/null; then true; else git rebase --abort 2>/dev/null || true; fi
